# Manual aisle-graph construction: `vertex add` + `edge add` directly
# populate the aisle_graph, replacing the auto-generated layout.

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
200,150
0,150
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

vertex add 0,75
----
0

vertex add 200,75
----
1

edge add 0,1
----
edge 0->1

generate
----
total_stalls: 146

snapshot
----
